title: B-PLOT 3 — Eva celebrates
prompt: Medium close-up in @bike_circle, golden hour light. @Eva straddles @eva-bike with one foot down on the pavement, white helmet pushed back slightly off the forehead, both fists raised over head in triumph, biggest smile. Off-camera cheers and clapping from family. Eva (yelling, beaming): "I DID IT! ALL BY MYSELF!" Sun-flare effect, triumphant music sting.
